# Golden snapshot — Uniform domain illumination (v6.0.0-dev, post-Phase-2, open boundary)

Generated: 2026-07-12T17:32:00.927Z | seed 42 | N=500,000 photons/run | 18 runs (M in {1,2,4} x Th0 in {0,60} deg x As in {0,0.5,1}) x 2 observation geometries = 36 rows.

Companion to golden_v5.4.0.json (legacy modes). Regenerate with gen_golden_ud.mjs and diff — every raw count must match exactly (deterministic RNG, seed 42). Cross-checks at generation time: all component-sum identities exact in every run; closures exact; M=1 rows reproduce legacy top rows bit-for-bit (240/240 fields vs golden_v5.4.0.json).
